name: springmaster_zbm_target_registry_and_lifecycle_alignment
description: Align Springmaster target delivery configuration to the first planned Java backend target zbm, defer running projects, and distinguish initialization from Core/Tooling/Defaults updates.
changes: Adds zbm as INITIALIZATION_CANDIDATE in the target registry
Marks IDM and Personnel as deferred non-delivery targets
Adds descriptor lifecycle fields for initialization versus updates
Adds a TARGET_DELIVERY_ENABLED guard to platform-update target-apply
Adds the defaults payload profile for baseline configuration defaults
Renumbers generated service slice blueprint follow-up to 000080
